title: Assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
§193. Assistant district attorneys

           The offices of first and second assistant district attorney for the Seventh Judicial District are created and established.

           Added by Acts 1958, No. 424, §1. Amended by Acts 1973, No. 118, §3.
doc_text:
§193.  Assistant district attorneys
The offices of first and second assistant district attorney for the Seventh
Judicial District are created and established.
Added by Acts 1958, No. 424, §1.  Amended by Acts 1973, No. 118,
§3.
